session.user: Run `make ty` and report results. This is a READ-ONLY check - do not modify files.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make ty` command to check the type system and report results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run type checker via make target

session.tool_result: uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
ty passed: All checks passed!
The type checker completed successfully with no errors or warnings. The Python codebase passes all static type analysis checks via pyright.
